name: Adas Careh (Lentil Butter)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine water, lentils, and salt in a pot. Cook until the lentils are soft.
2. Drain and reserve the cooking stock.
3. Heat oil in a skillet; sauté onions and garlic until onions are translucent.
4. Add parsley and spices; cook for another minute.
5. Set aside.
6. Combine lentils, cooking water, and onion mixture in a food processor. Add more water, tablespoon at a time, as needed, until the mixture reaches a spreadable consistency.
7. Refrigerate for a few hours before serving. Spread on whole grain crackers or use as a vegetable dip.
